problem: New mothers lack access to discreet, efficient, and technology-enabled breastfeeding and pelvic health solutions. Traditional breast pumps are bulky, loud, and difficult to use, while pelvic floor training lacks proper guidance and tracking.
solution: Smart women's health devices including wearable, silent breast pumps (Elvie Pump, Elvie Stride) with app-connected control, and the Elvie Trainer for pelvic floor exercises. Products feature app integration for tracking, guidance, and optimization, with hospital-grade performance in compact designs.
